subject: defocus model question
body:
Hi,

I have a question related to the defocus value given under Models in WARP.
I have data collected at 0.83A/pixel. By mistake, I gave the defocus value 
in Models as 1x4x1 instead of 4x4x1.
I got a map after processing the particle picking with 1x4x1 at a 
resolution of 3.8A. When I viewed the map in chimera, the volume was small 
to fit the crystal structure in it.
I increased the voxel size to 1.6 in chimera and now the crystal structure 
is fitting it.
When I saved this map at a voxel size of 1.6 and estimating the resolution 
it is coming out to be low resolution.
Could you suggest anything?

Thanks
Suruchi
